title: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
summary: Lathe is a Go CLI tool that uses LLMs to generate interactive, source-backed tutorials for learning technical domains. Instead of automating tasks, it guides users through hands-on coding exercises in a local web UI, with features like a table of contents, side-notes, and verification. It aims to fill gaps where human-written tutorials don't exist, promoting active learning over passive consumption.
